title: zornia quilonensis
intro: Zornia quilonensis, also known as the Indian cluster plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Zornia quilonensis can be prepared as a herbal decoction, infusion, or powder, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine.
